since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -2.41% · Gold -3.35% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.79%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.79%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.77%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.77%, INTC +10.79%, SMCI +10.58%, CEVA +10.38%, MU +10.33%. Laggards: INOD -6.85%, SPCX -5.35%, IBM -4.80%, WDAY -3.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.35% at $181.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
